
## Brachiopoda
```{r, results='asis', echo=FALSE, fig.dim=c(10,10)}
load_and_plot(1)
```


## Crustacea
```{r, results='asis', echo=FALSE, fig.dim=c(10,10)}
for(i in 2:11){
  load_and_plot(i)
}
```

## Echinoderms
```{r, results='asis', echo=FALSE, fig.dim=c(10,10)}
for(i in 13:38){
  load_and_plot(i)
}
```

## Fish, Rays & Skates
```{r, results='asis', echo=FALSE, fig.dim=c(10,10)}
for(i in 39:40){
  load_and_plot(i)
}
```

## Jellies
```{r, results='asis', echo=FALSE, fig.dim=c(10,10)}
for(i in 44:48){
  load_and_plot(i)
}
```

## Molluscs
```{r, results='asis', echo=FALSE, fig.dim=c(10,10)}
for(i in 49:57){
  load_and_plot(i)
}
```

## Seaspiders
```{r, results='asis', echo=FALSE, fig.dim=c(10,10)}
for(i in 58:59){
  load_and_plot(i)
}
```

## Worms
```{r, results='asis', echo=FALSE, fig.dim=c(10,10)}
for(i in 60:77){
  load_and_plot(i)
}
```

## Unidentified classifications
```{r, results='asis', echo=FALSE, fig.dim=c(10,10)}
for(i in 41:43){
  load_and_plot(i)
}
```
